projectDescription: A minimal, real-time multiplayer draw and guess game built with Next.js and Firebase.
keyFeatures: Real-time canvas synced across all players via Firebase Firestore
Host controls for rounds, draw time, hints, word count, max players, and categories
Score system with guess-order bonuses and drawer rewards
Progressive hints that reveal letters over time
Emoji reactions, vote-to-skip, and live chat
Server-side word bank — players cannot cheat by reading the client bundle
publicApiSurface: POST /api/game { action: 'getWordChoices' } — fetch word options for drawer
POST /api/game { action: 'guess' } — validate a player's guess
POST /api/game { action: 'selectWord' } — lock in the drawer's chosen word
POST /api/game { action: 'endRound' } — end the current round
createOrJoinRoom(roomId, player) — create or join a Firestore room
startGame(roomId, players, settings) — start a game session
sendChatMessage(roomId, player, text, secretWord) — send/validate chat messages
selectWord(roomId, word, drawerId) — drawer selects a word
nextTurn(roomId, room, players) — advance to the next drawer
revealHintLetter(word, currentMask) — reveal one hidden letter in the mask
